svg.text: Flat line-icon set, single 1.8px stroke, dark-theme palette. Accent color #e07b39 marks "active" state.
Material Color Swatches (data reference, not icons)
These are color-coded dots used in the Material/Block tree to distinguish substances at a glance — replace freely.
Example using the Rectangle tool icon — apply the same 3-state pattern to any icon above.
Grid cells: 110×110px icon tiles, 22px gutter, 132px pitch. Stroke weight: 1.8px @ 100% scale — crop along cell backgrounds for clean tiles.
All icons placeholder/reference only — swap for your own icon set (e.g. Lucide, Feather, custom SVGs) at any time; layout/sizing will remain compatible.
